name: Notion
tagline: All-in-one workspace for notes and docs
description: Notion combines notes, docs, wikis, and project tracking in a single flexible workspace used by teams and individuals.

name: Todoist
description: Todoist helps individuals and teams organize tasks and projects with a clean interface across all major platforms.

name: Linear
description: Linear is a streamlined project and issue tracking tool designed for high-performance software teams.

name: Obsidian
tagline: A knowledge base built on local Markdown files
description: Obsidian lets users write and link notes in plain Markdown, building a personal knowledge graph stored on their own device.

name: Asana
description: Asana helps teams plan, track, and manage projects and tasks with timelines, boards, and automation.

name: Calendly
description: Calendly eliminates back-and-forth emails by letting others book time on your calendar based on your availability.

name: GitHub
description: A platform for hosting and reviewing code, managing projects, and building software collaboratively, built on Git version control.

name: Postman
tagline: API platform for building and using APIs.
description: Postman lets developers design, test, document, and monitor APIs collaboratively across teams.

name: Vercel
tagline: Develop, preview, and ship frontend apps.
description: A cloud platform for deploying and hosting frontend frameworks like Next.js with instant previews and global edge delivery.

name: Docker
tagline: Build, share, and run containerized apps.
description: Docker provides tooling to package applications and their dependencies into portable containers for consistent development and deployment.

name: Sentry
description: Sentry helps developers detect, triage, and fix performance issues and crashes in real time across their software stack.

name: Supabase
description: Supabase gives developers a Postgres database, authentication, instant APIs, and storage to build apps quickly.

name: ChatGPT
tagline: Conversational AI assistant for work and life.
description: OpenAI's flagship chatbot for writing, coding, research, and general Q&A, powered by GPT models.

name: Midjourney
tagline: AI image generation from text prompts.
description: A Discord-based and web tool that generates highly stylized images and art from natural language descriptions.

name: Perplexity
description: A search assistant that answers questions in natural language with cited sources instead of just links.

name: ElevenLabs
description: A platform for generating realistic synthetic speech and cloning voices for audio, video, and app narration.

name: Runway
description: Creative suite offering text-to-video, video editing, and generative AI tools for filmmakers and designers.

name: Cursor
description: A code editor built around AI pair-programming, letting developers chat with and edit large codebases using LLMs.

name: Figma
description: A browser-based design platform for creating UI, prototypes, and design systems together in real time.

name: Canva
description: An online design tool for creating graphics, presentations, and marketing materials using templates and an easy visual editor.

name: Adobe XD
description: Adobe's vector-based tool for designing and prototyping websites and mobile apps.

name: Sketch
description: A vector graphics editor built for macOS focused on UI and product design workflows.

name: Dribbble
description: A community and portfolio platform where designers showcase work and find creative jobs.

name: Framer
description: A design tool that lets creators build interactive prototypes and publish production-ready websites without code.

name: X (Twitter)
description: A microblogging and social networking service where users post short updates, follow others, and engage in public discourse.

name: Instagram
tagline: Photo and video sharing social network.
description: A visually-driven social platform for sharing photos, videos, stories, and reels with friends and followers worldwide.

name: Reddit
tagline: The front page of the internet.
description: A network of community-driven forums (subreddits) where users discuss topics ranging from news to niche hobbies.

name: TikTok
description: An app for creating, sharing, and discovering short videos set to music, driven by a powerful recommendation algorithm.

name: LinkedIn
description: A social network for professionals to build connections, find jobs, and share industry content and updates.

name: Bluesky
description: A Twitter-like microblogging platform built on the open AT Protocol, emphasizing user choice and portable identity.

name: Netflix
tagline: Stream movies and TV shows on demand.
description: A subscription service offering a large library of films, series, and original productions across many genres.

name: YouTube
tagline: Watch and share videos from anyone.
description: A global video platform hosting everything from user uploads to music videos, live streams, and creator content.

name: Twitch
tagline: Live streaming for gamers and creators.
description: A live-streaming platform best known for video game broadcasts, esports, and interactive creator communities.

name: Hulu
tagline: Stream TV shows, movies, and originals.
description: A U.S. streaming service offering next-day episodes, films, and exclusive original programming.

name: Disney+
tagline: Stream Disney, Pixar, Marvel, and Star Wars.
description: Disney's flagship streaming service bundling content from its major studios and franchises.

name: Vimeo
tagline: Video hosting for creators and businesses.
description: A platform for hosting, sharing, and monetizing high-quality video content, popular with filmmakers and companies.
